# Westpac Altitude Black Credit Card

## Annual Fee
$250 per year (Mastercard) or $295 (Visa)

## Earn Rate
- Earn 1.25 Altitude Points per $1 spent on eligible everyday purchases
- Earn 3 Altitude Points per $1 spent with Qantas, Jetstar, Singapore Airlines, and Emirates

## Welcome Offer
150,000 bonus Altitude Points when you spend $6,000 on eligible purchases within 120 days of card approval. New customers only.

## Card Details
- Available as Visa or Mastercard
- Purchase rate: 20.49% p.a.
- Up to 45 interest-free days
